name: better-github-pr-view
description: Release tooling and store metadata for Better GitHub PR View.

scripts.pack:chrome: npm run build:chrome && node scripts/pack.mjs chrome
scripts.pack:firefox: npm run build:firefox && node scripts/pack.mjs firefox
scripts.lint:firefox: npm run build:firefox && web-ext lint -s dist/firefox
scripts.check:release: npm run build:chrome && npm run build:firefox && npm run lint:firefox && node scripts/check-release.mjs && npm run pack:chrome && npm run pack:firefox
